articles.title: Cboe's JJ Kinahan on the launch of prediction markets
articles.summary: Cboe's JJ Kinahan discusses the exchange's entry into prediction markets, marking another major traditional finance player jumping into the space. This validates prediction markets as a legitimate asset class and could bring institutional money and regulatory clarity that the industry desperately needs.

articles.title: People Are Making Money Betting on Pretaped ‘Survivor’ Episodes
articles.summary: Bettors are finding ways to profit on Survivor episodes that were filmed months ago, exploiting information asymmetries about predetermined outcomes. This exposes a fundamental flaw in entertainment betting markets where the "future" event already happened, creating insider trading opportunities that could force sportsbooks to rethink how they handle reality TV wagers.

articles.title: States vs. Prediction Markets: Regulatory Battles
articles.summary: State regulators are cracking down on prediction markets, launching investigations and threatening legal action against platforms operating in their jurisdictions. These battles will determine whether Americans can legally bet on elections and other events, potentially forcing popular platforms underground or out of the US market entirely.

articles.title: Opinion | Both parties fear this betting craze. Blinding the public won’t help.
articles.summary: Politicians from both sides want to crack down on the betting boom that's reshaping how Americans engage with politics and current events. The regulatory backlash threatens to push prediction markets underground just when they're proving most valuable for price discovery and public sentiment tracking.

articles.title: MLB Partners with Polymarket, Signs Unprecedented Agreement with CFTC
articles.summary: MLB just signed a groundbreaking deal with Polymarket that includes regulatory approval from the CFTC, marking the first time a major sports league has officially partnered with a prediction market platform. This partnership legitimizes prediction markets in mainstream sports and opens the door for other leagues to follow suit, potentially flooding these platforms with new retail money and liquidity.

articles.title: Major League Baseball Steps Into the Prediction Markets, Strikes Deal With Polymarket
articles.summary: MLB just signed a partnership deal with Polymarket, bringing America's pastime into the crypto prediction markets arena. This marks another major sports league legitimizing prediction markets beyond traditional sportsbooks, potentially opening the floodgates for more mainstream adoption and regulatory acceptance.

articles.title: Polymarket Is Opening a Pop-Up Bar at DC’s Proper 21
articles.summary: Polymarket is launching a temporary bar at Proper 21 in Washington DC, bringing prediction markets directly to the political power center during what's likely a key election period. The move signals Polymarket's push to mainstream political betting and court DC insiders who could shape the regulatory future of prediction markets.

articles.title: Maybe Turning War Into a Casino Was a Bad Idea?
articles.summary: Military prediction markets are facing fresh scrutiny as real-world conflicts turn into betting opportunities with actual human costs. The backlash could trigger new regulations that limit how far prediction platforms can push into sensitive geopolitical events, shrinking the already narrow pool of high-stakes markets that serious bettors actually care about.

articles.title: Who wins 'Survivor 50'? Odds predict Season 50 spoiler, but how?
articles.summary: Betting markets are handicapping Survivor's milestone 50th season before it even airs, with odds already pointing to a likely winner despite the show's secrecy. The leak suggests either production security has serious holes or savvy bettors are finding ways to extract value from reality TV's most guarded secrets.

articles.title: How people are making millions on the Iran war
articles.summary: Defense contractors and oil traders are raking in massive profits as Middle East tensions spike, with some firms seeing 40%+ stock gains since October. Smart money is already positioning on geopolitical prediction markets, where Iran conflict odds directly move energy futures and defense sector plays worth billions.

articles.title: Exclusive: Polymarket acquires the startup Brahma, in effort to scale its crypto and DeFi infrastructure
articles.summary: Polymarket bought DeFi startup Brahma to beef up its crypto infrastructure and handle more betting volume. The acquisition signals Polymarket expects massive growth and wants to avoid the technical meltdowns that plague other crypto betting platforms when big events drive traffic spikes.

articles.title: Betting on Ayatollah’s Ouster Ignites Ire Over Prediction Markets
articles.summary: Prediction markets are taking bets on when Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Khamenei will leave power, sparking outrage from critics who say it's morally wrong to gamble on political upheaval. The controversy highlights how prediction markets push boundaries by pricing sensitive geopolitical events, which could attract regulatory scrutiny or platform restrictions on what can be traded.
